specs.name: alpha_idea_1
specs.description: volume dislocation alpha. Guided by no memory priors. Candidate #1.
specs.implementation_stub:
def compute_alpha_idea_1(df):
    volume_ratio = df['volume'] / df['volume'].rolling(20).mean()
    abs_ret = df['close'].pct_change().abs()
    signal = ((volume_ratio - volume_ratio.rolling(20).mean()) / volume_ratio.rolling(20).std()) * -((abs_ret - abs_ret.rolling(20).mean()) / abs_ret.rolling(20).std())
    return signal
